clientConfigFields.label: App Bearer Token
clientConfigFields.description: Optional X app-only bearer token used by full archive search and compliance job actions.

fields.label: User Access Token
fields.description: X OAuth 2.0 user access token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. The token must include the action's required X user scopes.

fields.label: App Bearer Token
fields.description: Optional X app-only bearer token used by full archive search and compliance job actions.
